info.description: Carrier Global Corp. engages in the provision of climate and energy solutions with a focus on providing differentiated, digitally-enabled lifecycle solutions to its customers. Its portfolio includes brands such as Carrier, Viessmann, Toshiba, Automated Logic and Carrier Transicold that offer innovative heating, ventilating, air conditioning (HVAC) and cold chain transportation solutions. It also provides a broad array of related building services, including audit, design, installation, system integration, repair, maintenance and monitoring. The firm operates through the following segments: Climate Solutions Americas (CSA), Climate Solutions Europe (CSE), Climate Solutions Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa (CSAME) and Climate Solutions Transportation (CST). The CSA segment provides products, controls, services and solutions to meet the heating, cooling and ventilation needs of residential and commercial customers in North and South America. The CSE segment provides products, controls, services and solutions to meet the heating, cooling and ventilation needs of residential and commercial customers in Europe. The CSAME segment provides products, controls, services and solutions to meet the heating, cooling and ventilation needs of residential and commercial customers in Asia Pacific, the Middle East and Africa. The CST segment includes global transport refrigeration and monitoring products, services and digital solutions for trucks, trailers, shipping containers, intermodal and rail. The company was founded by Willis Haviland Carrier on June 26, 1915 and is headquartered in Palm Beach Gardens, FL.
info.description_zh: Carrier Global Corp. 致力於提供氣候和能源解決方案，重點是為其客戶提供差異化的數位化生命週期解決方案。其產品組合包括 Carrier、Viessmann、Toshiba、Automated Logic 和 Carrier Transicold 等品牌，提供創新的暖氣、通風、空調 (HVAC) 和冷鏈運輸解決方案。它還提供廣泛的相關建築服務，包括審計、設計、安裝、系統整合、維修、維護和監控。該公司透過以下部門運作：氣候解決方案美洲部門 (CSA)、氣候解決方案歐洲部門 (CSE)、氣候解決方案亞太、中東和非洲部門 (CSAME) 以及氣候解決方案運輸部門 (CST)。 CSA 部門提供產品、控制、服務和解決方案，以滿足北美和南美住宅和商業客戶的供暖、冷氣和通風需求。 CSE 部門提供產品、控制、服務和解決方案，以滿足歐洲住宅和商業客戶的暖氣、冷氣和通風需求。 CSAME 部門提供產品、控制、服務和解決方案，以滿足亞太地區、中東和非洲住宅和商業客戶的暖氣、冷氣和通風需求。 CST 部門包括用於卡車、拖車、貨櫃、聯運和鐵路的全球運輸冷凍和監控產品、服務和數位解決方案。該公司由 Willis Haviland Carrier 於 1915 年 6 月 26 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州棕櫚灘花園。

info.description: Constellation Brands, Inc. engages in the production, marketing, and distribution of beer, wine, and spirits. It operates through the following segments: Beer, Wine and Spirits, Corporate Operations and Other, and Canopy. The Beer segment includes imported and craft beer brands. The Wine and Spirits segment sells wine brands across all categories-table wine, sparkling wine, and dessert wine-and across all price points. The Corporate Operations and Other segment refers to the costs of executive management, corporate development, corporate finance, human resources, internal audit, investor relations, legal, public relations, and information technology. The Canopy segment consists of canopy equity method Investments. The company was founded by Marvin Sands in 1945 and is headquartered in Rochester, NY.
info.description_zh: Constellation Brands, Inc. 從事啤酒、葡萄酒和烈酒的生產、行銷和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：啤酒、葡萄酒和烈酒部門、企業營運及其他部門以及 Canopy 部門。啤酒細分市場包括進口啤酒和精釀啤酒品牌。葡萄酒和烈酒部門銷售所有類別的葡萄酒品牌——佐餐酒、氣泡酒和甜點酒——以及所有價位的葡萄酒。公司營運和其他部門是指執行管理、公司發展、公司財務、人力資源、內部稽核、投資者關係、法律、公共關係和資訊科技的成本。 Canopy 部門由 Canopy 權益法投資組成。該公司由 Marvin Sands 於 1945 年創立，總部位於紐約州羅徹斯特。

info.description: Trane Technologies Plc engages in providing solutions to buildings, homes, and transportation. It operates through the following business segments: Americas, EMEA, and Asia Pacific. The Americas segment encompasses commercial heating and cooling systems, building controls, and energy services and solutions, residential heating and cooling, and transport refrigeration systems, and solutions in North America and Latin America regions. The EMEA segment includes heating and cooling systems, services and solutions for commercial buildings, and transport refrigeration systems and solutions in Europe, Middle East, and Africa regions. The Asia Pacific segment is involved in heating and cooling systems, services and solutions for commercial buildings and transport refrigeration systems and solutions in Asia Pacific region. The company was founded in 1871 and is headquartered in Swords, Ireland.
info.description_zh: 特靈科技有限公司致力於為建築、住宅和交通提供解決方案。它透過以下業務部門運作：美洲、歐洲、中東和非洲和亞太地區。美洲部門包括商業供暖和製冷系統、樓宇控制、能源服務和解決方案、住宅供暖和製冷、運輸冷卻系統以及北美和拉丁美洲地區的解決方案。歐洲、中東和非洲地區包括商業建築的暖氣和冷氣系統、服務和解決方案，以及歐洲、中東和非洲地區的運輸冷卻系統和解決方案。亞太地區業務涉及亞太地區商業建築的供暖和製冷系統、服務和解決方案以及運輸冷卻系統和解決方案。該公司成立於 1871 年，總部位於愛爾蘭索茲。

info.description: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. engages in the provision of mechanical and electrical contracting services. It operates through the Mechanical and Electrical Services segments. The Mechanical Services segment includes heating, ventilation, air conditioning, plumbing, piping, and controls, as well as off-site construction, monitoring, and fire protection. The Electrical services segment focuses on installation and servicing electrical systems. The company was founded by Alfred J. Giardinelli, Jr. And William George III on December 12, 1996 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. 從事提供機械和電氣承包服務。它透過機械和電氣服務部門運作。機械服務部門包括暖氣、通風、空調、管道、管道和控制，以及場外施工、監控和消防。電氣服務部門專注於電氣系統的安裝和維修。該公司由 Alfred J. Giardinelli, Jr. 和 William George III 於 1996 年 12 月 12 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Iron Mountain, Inc. engages in the provision of storage and information management solutions. It operates through the following business segments: Global Records & Information Management Business, Global Data Center Business and Corporate & Other Business. The Global Records & Information Management Business segment offers comprehensive solutions for storing, managing, digitizing, and securely disposing of records and information worldwide. The Global Data Center Business segment provides data center facilities to protect mission-critical assets and ensure the continued operation of its customers IT infrastructures, with secure and reliable colocation and wholesale options. The Corporate & Other Business segment consists of the storage, safeguarding and electronic or physical deliveries of physical media of all types and digital content repository systems to house, distribute, and archive key media assets, primarily for entertainment and media industry clients. The company was founded by Herman Knaust in 1951 and is headquartered in Portsmouth, NH.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 專業
info.description_zh: Iron Mountain, Inc. 從事提供儲存和資訊管理解決方案。它透過以下業務部門運作：全球記錄和資訊管理業務、全球資料中心業務以及企業及其他業務。全球記錄和資訊管理業務部門提供用於儲存、管理、數位化和安全處置全球記錄和資訊的全面解決方案。全球資料中心業務部門提供資料中心設施，以保護關鍵任務資產並確保客戶 IT 基礎設施的持續運營，並提供安全可靠的託管和批發選項。企業及其他業務部門包括所有類型的實體媒體和數位內容儲存庫系統的儲存、保護和電子或實體交付，以容納、分發和存檔關鍵媒體資產，主要面向娛樂和媒體行業客戶。該公司由 Herman Knaust 於 1951 年創立，總部位於新罕布夏州朴茨茅斯。

info.description: Public Storage is a real estate investment trust, which engages in acquiring, developing, owning and operating self-storage facilities. It operates through the following segments: Self-Storage Operations, Ancillary Operations, and Other Items. The Self-Storage Operations segment reflects the rental operations from all self-storage facilities. The Ancillary Operations segment deals with the sale of merchandise and reinsurance of policies against losses to goods stored by self-storage tenants, activities which are incidental to the primary self-storage rental activities. The Other Items segment includes general, administrative, and investment costs. The company was founded by Bradley Wayne Hughes, Sr. and Kenneth Q. Volk, Jr. in 1972 and is headquartered in Frisco, TX.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 工業
info.description_zh: Public Storage是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事收購、開發、擁有和經營自助倉儲設施。它透過以下部門運作：自儲存業務、輔助業務和其他項目。自助倉儲業務部門反映了所有自助倉儲設施的租賃業務。輔助業務部門負責商品銷售以及針對自助倉儲租戶儲存的貨物損失保單的再保險，這些活動是主要自助倉儲租賃活動的附帶活動。其他項目部分包括一般成本、管理成本和投資成本。該公司由 Bradley Wayne Hughes, Sr. 和 Kenneth Q. Volk, Jr. 於 1972 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州弗里斯科。

info.description: Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of hospitality businesses. It operates through the Management and Franchise, and Ownership segments. The Management and Franchise segment operates hotels of third-party owners. The Ownership segment includes owned, leased, and joint venture hotels. The company was founded by Conrad N. Hilton in 1925 and is headquartered in McLean, VA.
info.description_zh: 希爾頓全球控股公司 (Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Inc.) 從事飯店業務。它透過管理和特許經營以及所有權部門進行運作。管理和特許經營部門經營第三方業主的旅館。所有權部門包括自有、租賃和合資酒店。該公司由 Conrad N. Hilton 於 1925 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州麥克萊恩。

info.description: EMCOR Group, Inc. engages in the provision of electrical and mechanical construction, and facilities services. It operates through the following segments: United States Electrical Construction and Facilities Services, United States Mechanical Construction and Facilities Services, United States Building Services, United States Industrial Services, and United Kingdom Building Services. The United States Electrical Construction and Facilities Services segment offers systems for electrical power transmission and distribution. The United States Mechanical Construction and Facilities Services segment is involved in systems for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, refrigeration, and clean-room process ventilation. The United States Building Services segment is composed of operations which provide a portfolio of services needed to support the operation and maintenance of customers' facilities. The United States Industrial Services segment covers operations which provide industrial maintenance and services. The United Kingdom Building Services segment consists of commercial and government site-based operations and maintenance, and facility maintenance and services. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Norwalk, CT.
info.description_zh: EMCOR Group, Inc. 從事提供電氣和機械建築以及設施服務。它透過以下部門運作：美國電氣建築和設施服務部門、美國機械建築和設施服務部門、美國建築服務部門、美國工業服務部門和英國建築服務部門。美國電力建設和設施服務部門提供電力傳輸和分配系統。美國機械製造和設施服務部門涉及暖氣、通風、空調、冷氣和無塵室工藝通風系統。美國建築服務部門由提供支援客戶設施營運和維護所需的一系列服務的業務組成。美國工業服務部門涵蓋提供工業維護和服務的業務。英國建築服務部門包括商業和政府現場運作和維護以及設施維護和服務。該公司成立於 1987 年，總部位於康乃狄克州諾沃克。

info.description: Parker-Hannifin Corp. engages in the manufacture of motion and control technologies and systems. It operates through the Diversified Industrial and Aerospace Systems segments. The Diversified Industrial segment sells products to both original equipment manufacturers and distributors who serve the replacement markets in manufacturing, packaging, processing, transportation, mobile construction, refrigeration and air conditioning, agricultural and military machinery, and equipment industries. The Aerospace Systems segment offers products primarily in the commercial and military aerospace markets to both OEMs and to end users for spares, maintenance, repair, and overhaul. The company was founded by Arthur L. Parker in 1918 and is headquartered in Cleveland, OH.
info.description_zh: Parker-Hannifin Corp. 從事運動和控制技術及系統的製造。它透過多元化工業和航空航天系統部門運作。多元化工業部門向原始設備製造商和分銷商銷售產品，這些製造商和分銷商服務於製造、包裝、加工、運輸、移動建築、製冷和空調、農業和軍用機械以及設備行業的替代市場。航空航太系統部門主要在商業和軍用航空航太市場向原始設備製造商和最終用戶提供備件、維護、修理和大修產品。該公司由 Arthur L. Parker 於 1918 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州克利夫蘭。

info.description: ASML Holding NV engages in the development, production, marketing, sales, upgrading and servicing of advanced semiconductor equipment systems. It includes lithography, metrology and inspection systems. The company was founded on April 1, 1984 and is headquartered in Veldhoven, the Netherlands.
info.description_zh: ASML Holding NV 從事先進半導體設備系統的開發、生產、行銷、銷售、升級和服務。它包括光刻、計量和檢測系統。該公司成立於1984年4月1日，總部位於荷蘭費爾德霍芬。

info.description: Coherent Corp. engages in the development, refinement, manufacturing, and marketing of engineered materials, opto-electronic components and devices, and lasers for use in the industrial, communications, electronics, and instrumentation markets. It operates through the following segments: Networking, Materials, and Lasers. The Networking segment leverages compound semiconductor technology platforms and deep knowledge of end-user applications. The Materials segment markets engineered materials and optoelectronic devices. The Lasers segment serves industrial customers in semiconductor capital equipment, display capital equipment, precision manufacturing, and aerospace and defense, as well as instrumentation customers in life sciences and scientific research. The company was founded by Carl J. Johnson in 1971 and is headquartered in Saxonburg, PA.
info.description_zh: Coherent Corp. 從事工業、通訊、電子和儀器儀表市場使用的工程材料、光電元件和設備以及雷射的開發、精煉、製造和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：網路、材料和雷射。網路部門利用複合半導體技術平台和對最終用戶應用的深入了解。材料部門銷售工程材料和光電設備。雷射部門為半導體資本設備、顯示資本設備、精密製造、航空航太和國防領域的工業客戶以及生命科學和科學研究領域的儀器儀表客戶提供服務。該公司由 Carl J. Johnson 於 1971 年創立，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州薩克森堡。

info.description: Lennox International, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of products for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration. It operates through the following segments: Home Comfort Solutions, Building Climate Solutions, and Corporate and Other. The Home Comfort Solutions segment is involved in furnaces, air conditioners, heat pumps, packaged heating and cooling systems, indoor air quality equipment, comfort control products, replacement parts, and supplies. The Building Climate Solutions segment consists of unitary heating and air conditioning equipment, applied systems, controls, installation and service of commercial heating and cooling equipment, variable refrigerant flow commercial products, curb, curb adapters, drop box diffusers, HVAC recycling and salvage service, condensing units, unit coolers, fluid coolers, air cooled condensers, air handlers, process chillers, controls, and compressor racks. The Corporate and Other segment refers to the unitary heating and air conditioning equipment, chillers, air handlers, fan coils, fluid coolers, and compressor racks. The company was founded by Dave Lennox in 1895 and is headquartered in Richardson, TX.
info.description_zh: Lennox International, Inc. 從事暖氣、通風、空調和冷凍產品的設計、製造和行銷。該公司透過以下部門運作：家庭舒適解決方案部門、建築氣候解決方案部門以及企業及其他部門。家庭舒適解決方案部門涉及熔爐、空調、熱泵、成套供暖和製冷系統、室內空氣品質設備、舒適控制產品、替換零件和用品。建築氣候解決方案部門包括單一暖氣和空調設備、應用系統、控制裝置、商用暖氣和冷氣設備的安裝和服務、可變冷媒流量商業產品、路緣、路緣適配器、吊箱擴散器、HVAC回收和報廢服務、冷凝裝置、單元冷卻器、流體冷卻器、風冷冷凝器、空氣處理器、製程冷卻器、控制裝置和壓縮機架。企業及其他部門是指單一暖氣和空調設備、冷水機、空氣處理器、風機盤管、液體冷卻器和壓縮機機架。該公司由 Dave Lennox 於 1895 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州理查森。

info.description: Xcel Energy, Inc. is an electric and natural gas delivery company. It operates through the following three segments: Regulated Electric, Regulated Natural Gas Utility and All Others. The Regulated Electric segment focuses on generating, purchasing, transmitting, and distributing electricity. The Regulated Natural Gas Utility segment includes purchases, transport, stores, distribution, and sales. The All Others segment involves steam, appliance repair services, non-utility real estate activities, revenues associated with processing solid waste into refuse-derived fuel, investments in rental housing projects that qualify for low-income housing tax credits and equity method investments in energy impact partners funds. The company was founded in 1909 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Xcel Energy, Inc. 是一家電力和天然氣輸送公司。它透過以下三個部門運作：監管電力部門、監管天然氣公用事業部門和所有其他部門。監管電力部門專注於發電、購買、傳輸和分配電力。受監管的天然氣公用事業部門包括採購、運輸、儲存、分銷和銷售。所有其他部門涉及蒸汽、家電維修服務、非公用事業房地產活動、與將固體廢物加工成垃圾衍生燃料相關的收入、對符合低收入住房稅收抵免資格的租賃住房項目的投資以及對能源影響合作夥伴基金的權益法投資。該公司成立於 1909 年，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: PG&E Corp. operates as a holding company, which engages in generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity and natural gas to customers. It specializes in energy, utility, power, gas, electricity, solar, and sustainability. The company was founded on November 17, 1995 and is headquartered in Oakland, CA.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: PG&E Corp. 作為一家控股公司運營，從事發電、傳輸以及向客戶分配電力和天然氣。它專注於能源、公用事業、電力、天然氣、電力、太陽能和永續發展。該公司成立於1995年11月17日，總部位於加州奧克蘭。

info.description: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners plc engages in the distribution and sale of non-alcoholic ready-to-drink beverages. It operates through the following geographical segments: Iberia, Germany, Great Britain, France, Belgium and Luxembourg, Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, and Iceland. The Iberia segment refers to Spain, Portugal, and Andorra. The France segment includes continental France and Monaco. The company was founded on August 4, 2015 and is headquartered in Uxbridge, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: 可口可樂歐洲太平洋合作夥伴有限公司從事非酒精即飲飲料的經銷和銷售。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：伊比利亞半島、德國、英國、法國、比利時和盧森堡、荷蘭、挪威、瑞典和冰島。伊比利亞航段指西班牙、葡萄牙和安道爾。法國部分包括法國本土和摩納哥。該公司成立於2015年8月4日，總部位於英國烏克斯布里奇。

info.description: Howmet Aerospace, Inc. engages in the development and manufacturing of lightweight metal products. It operates through the following segments: Engine Products, Fastening Systems, Engineered Structures, and Forged Wheels. The Engine Products segment produces investment castings, including airfoils, and seamless rolled rings primarily for aircraft engines and industrial gas turbines. The Fastening Systems segment is involved in producing aerospace fastening systems and commercial transportation fasteners. The Engineered Structures segment includes titanium ingots and mill products for aerospace and defense applications and is vertically integrated to produce titanium forgings, extrusions forming and machining services for airframe, wing, aero-engine, and landing gear components. The Forged Wheels segment provides forged aluminum wheels and related products for heavy-duty trucks, trailers, and buses globally. The company was founded in 1888 and is headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA.
info.description_zh: Howmet Aerospace, Inc. 從事輕質金屬產品的開發與製造。它透過以下部門運作：引擎產品、緊固系統、工程結構和鍛造車輪。引擎產品部門生產熔模鑄件，包括主要用於飛機引擎和工業燃氣渦輪機的翼型件和無縫軋製環。緊固系統部門生產航太緊固系統和商業運輸緊固件。工程結構部門包括用於航空航太和國防應用的鈦錠和銑削產品，並垂直整合生產鈦鍛件、擠壓成型以及機身、機翼、航空發動機和起落架部件的加工服務。鍛造車輪部門為全球重型卡車、拖車和巴士提供鍛造鋁車輪及相關產品。該公司成立於 1888 年，總部位於賓夕法尼亞州匹茲堡。

info.description: FedEx Corp. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of transportation, e-commerce, business services, and business solutions. It operates through the following segments: FedEx Express, FedEx Freight, Corporate, Other, and Eliminations. The FedEx Express segment offers transportation and delivery services. The FedEx Freight segment refers to freight transportation services to business and residences. The FedEx Services segment includes sales, marketing, information technology, communications, customer service, technical support, billing and collection services, and certain back-office functions that support the company's operating segments. The Corporate, Other, and Eliminations segment is involved in the corporate headquarters costs for executive officers and certain legal and finance functions, as well as certain other costs and credits not attributed to the firm's core business. The company was founded by Frederick Wallace Smith on June 18, 1971, and is headquartered in Memphis, TN.
info.description_zh: 聯邦快遞公司是一家控股公司，從事提供運輸、電子商務、商業服務和商業解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：聯邦快遞部門、聯邦快遞貨運部門、企業部門、其他部門和消除部門。聯邦快遞部門提供運輸和送貨服務。聯邦快遞貨運部門是指向企業和住宅提供貨運服務。聯邦快遞服務部門包括銷售、行銷、資訊科技、通訊、客戶服務、技術支援、計費和收款服務以及支援公司營運部門的某些後台職能。公司、其他和抵銷部門涉及執行官和某些法律和財務職能的公司總部成本，以及不屬於公司核心業務的某些其他成本和信貸。該公司由 Frederick Wallace Smith 於 1971 年 6 月 18 日創立，總部位於田納西州孟菲斯。

info.description: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of energy and related products. It offers regulated retail and wholesale electricity businesses and related activities, such as generation, transmission, and distribution through its subsidiary, Arizona Public Service Co. The company was founded on February 20, 1985, and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. 是一家控股公司，從事提供能源及相關產品業務。它透過其子公司亞利桑那公共服務公司提供受監管的零售和批發電力業務及相關活動，例如發電、輸電和配電。該公司成立於 1985 年 2 月 20 日，總部位於亞利桑那州鳳凰城。

info.description: Alliant Energy Corp. engages in the provision of regulated electricity and natural gas service to natural gas customers in the Midwest through its two public utility subsidiaries. It operates through the Utility and ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segments. The Utility segment includes the operations of IPL and WPL, which primarily serve retail customers in Iowa and Wisconsin. The ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segment refers to the operations of AEF and its subsidiaries, Corporate Services, the Alliant Energy parent company, and any Alliant Energy parent company consolidating adjustments. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Madison, WI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Alliant Energy Corp. 透過其兩家公用事業子公司向中西部的天然氣客戶提供受監管的電力和天然氣服務。它透過公用事業和 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門進行運作。公用事業部門包括 IPL 和 WPL 的業務，主要為愛荷華州和威斯康辛州的零售客戶提供服務。 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門是指 AEF 及其子公司、企業服務、Alliant Energy 母公司以及任何 Alliant Energy 母公司合併調整的業務。該公司成立於 1981 年，總部位於威斯康辛州麥迪遜。

info.description: MercadoLibre, Inc. engages in the development of an online commerce platform with a focus on e-commerce and related services. It operates through the following geographical segments: Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, and Other Countries. The Other Countries segment refers to Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Panama, Peru, Bolivia, Honduras, Nicaragua, El Salvador, Guatemala, Paraguay, Uruguay, and the United States of America. Its products provide a mechanism for buying, selling, and paying as well as collecting, generating leads, and comparing lists through e-commerce transactions. The company was founded by Marcos Eduardo Galperin on October 15, 1999 and is headquartered in Montevideo, Uruguay.
info.description_zh: MercadoLibre, Inc. 從事線上商務平台的開發，專注於電子商務及相關服務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：巴西、阿根廷、墨西哥和其他國家。其他國家部分是指智利、哥倫比亞、哥斯大黎加、多明尼加共和國、厄瓜多、巴拿馬、秘魯、玻利維亞、宏都拉斯、尼加拉瓜、薩爾瓦多、瓜地馬拉、巴拉圭、烏拉圭和美利堅合眾國。其產品提供了一種購買、銷售、支付以及透過電子商務交易收集、產生潛在客戶和比較清單的機制。該公司由Marcos Eduardo Galperin於1999年10月15日創立，總部位於烏拉圭蒙得維的亞。

info.description: Huntington Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company, which engages in the provision of full-service commercial and consumer deposit, lending, and other banking services. It operates through Consumer and Regional Banking, and Commercial Banking. The Consumer and Regional Banking segment provides a wide array of financial products and services to consumer and business customers including deposits, lending, payments, mortgage banking, dealer financing, investment management, trust, brokerage, insurance, and other financial products and services. The Commercial Banking segment is involved in expertise through bankers, capabilities, and digital channels, and includes a comprehensive set of product offerings. The company was founded in 1866 and is headquartered in Columbus, OH.
info.description_zh: Huntington Bancshares, Inc. 是一家銀行控股公司，提供全方位商業和消費者存款、貸款和其他銀行服務。它透過消費者和區域銀行業務以及商業銀行業務開展業務。消費者和區域銀行業務部門為消費者和企業客戶提供廣泛的金融產品和服務，包括存款、貸款、支付、抵押銀行、經銷商融資、投資管理、信託、經紀、保險和其他金融產品和服務。商業銀行部門透過銀行家、能力和數位管道提供專業知識，並提供一整套全面的產品。該公司成立於 1866 年，總部位於俄亥俄州哥倫布。

info.description: Lowe's Companies, Inc. engages in the retail sale of home improvement products. The firm offers products for maintenance, repair, remodeling, home decorating, and property maintenance. It also provides home improvement products in the following categories: appliances, seasonal & outdoor living, lumber, lawn & garden, kitchens & bath, hardware, building materials, millwork, paint, rough plumbing, tools, electrical, flooring, and decor. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Mooresville, NC.
info.description_zh: Lowe's Companies, Inc. 從事家居裝修產品的零售業務。該公司提供用於維護、修理、改造、家居裝飾和物業維護的產品。它還提供以下類別的家居裝修產品：電器、季節性和戶外生活、木材、草坪和花園、廚房和浴室、五金、建築材料、木製品、油漆、粗糙管道、工具、電氣、地板和裝飾。該公司成立於 1946 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州穆爾斯維爾。

info.description: GE Aerospace is an American aircraft company, which engages in the provision of jet and turboprop engines, as well as integrated systems for commercial, military, business, and general aviation aircraft. The firm's portfolio of brands includes Avio Aero, Unison, GE Additive, and Dowty Propellers. It operates through the following segments: Commercial Engines and Services, Defense and Propulsion Technologies, and Corporate and Other. The Commercial Engines and Services segment is involved in the design, development, manufacturing, and servicing of jet engines for commercial airframes, as well as business aviation and aeroderivative applications. The Defense and Propulsion Technologies segment offers defense engines and critical aircraft systems. The Corporate and Other segment relates to corporate functions and operations costs. The company was founded by Thomas Alva Edison in 1878 and is headquartered in Evendale, OH.
info.description_zh: GE航空航太公司是一家美國飛機公司，主要為商用、軍用、公務和通用航空飛機提供噴射和渦輪螺旋槳發動機以及整合系統。該公司的品牌組合包括 Avio Aero、Unison、GE Additive 和 Dowty Propellers。它透過以下部門運作：商用引擎和服務部門、國防和推進技術部門以及企業和其他部門。商用發動機和服務部門涉及商用機身噴射發動機的設計、開發、製造和維修，以及公務航空和航改應用。國防和推進技術部門提供國防發動機和關鍵飛機系統。公司及其他部門涉及公司職能和營運成本。該公司由托馬斯·阿爾瓦·愛迪生於 1878 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州埃文代爾。

info.description: Walmart, Inc. engages in the retail and wholesale business. The company offers an assortment of merchandise and services at everyday low prices. It operates through the following business segments: Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club. The Walmart U.S. segment operates as a mass merchandiser of consumer products, operating under the Walmart and Walmart Neighborhood Market brands, including walmart.com. The Walmart International segment includes operations of wholly-owned subsidiaries in Canada, Chile, China, and Africa, and majority-owned subsidiaries in India, as well as Mexico and Central America. The Sam's Club segment manages membership-only warehouse clubs and operates samsclub.com. The company was founded by Samuel Moore Walton and James Lawrence Walton on July 2, 1962 and is headquartered in Bentonville, AR.
info.description_zh: 沃爾瑪公司從事零售和批發業務。該公司以每日低價提供各種商品和服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：沃爾瑪美國公司、沃爾瑪國際公司和山姆會員店。沃爾瑪美國部門是一家消費性產品批發商，以沃爾瑪和沃爾瑪鄰里市場品牌經營，包括 walmart.com。沃爾瑪國際部門包括在加拿大、智利、中國和非洲的全資子公司以及在印度、墨西哥和中美洲的控股子公司。山姆會員店部門管理會員制倉儲俱樂部並經營 samsclub.com。該公司由 Samuel Moore Walton 和 James Lawrence Walton 於 1962 年 7 月 2 日創立，總部位於阿肯色州本頓維爾。

info.description: Fox Corp. engages in providing television production and broadcasting services. It also provides news under the brands FOX News Media, FOX Sports, FOX Entertainment and FOX Television Stations, and Tubi Media Group. It operates through the following segments: Cable Network Programming, Television, and Other and Corporate. The Cable Network Programming segment refers to the production and licensing of news and sports content distributed primarily through traditional cable television systems, direct broadcast satellite operators, and telecommunication companies and online multi-channel video programming distributors. The Television segment focuses on the acquisition, marketing, and distribution of broadcast network programming. The Other and Corporate segment relates to the FOX Studio Lot, Credible Labs Inc, corporate overhead costs, and intracompany eliminations. The company was founded by Keith Rupert Murdoch on May 3, 2018, and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 福斯公司從事提供電視製作和廣播服務。它還以福克斯新聞媒體、福克斯體育、福克斯娛樂、福克斯電視台以及 Tubi Media Group 品牌提供新聞。它透過以下部門運作：有線電視節目部門、電視部門、其他部門和企業部門。有線電視網絡節目部門是指主要透過傳統有線電視系統、直播衛星營運商、電信公司和線上多頻道視訊節目發行商分發的新聞和體育內容的製作和許可。電視部門專注於廣播網路節目的收購、行銷和發行。其他和公司部門涉及 FOX Studio Lot、Credible Labs Inc、公司管理費用和公司內部抵銷。該公司由基斯·魯珀特·默多克於2018年5月3日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Ingersoll Rand Inc. engages in the provision of services and solutions through air, fluid, energy, and medical technologies. It operates through the Industrial Technologies and Services, and Precision and Science Technologies segments. The Industrial Technologies and Services segment provides compressor, vacuum, blower solutions, and industrial technologies such as power tools and lifting equipment. The Precision and Science Technologies segment includes fluid management solutions such as precision liquid and gas pumps, and niche compression technologies. The company was founded in 1872 and is headquartered in Davidson, NC.
info.description_zh: Ingersoll Rand Inc. 致力於透過空氣、流體、能源和醫療技術提供服務和解決方案。它透過工業技術和服務以及精密和科學技術部門運作。工業技術和服務部門提供壓縮機、真空、鼓風機解決方案以及電動工具和起重設備等工業技術。精密和科學技術部門包括流體管理解決方案，例如精密液體和氣體泵以及利基壓縮技術。該公司成立於 1872 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州戴維森。

info.description: GE Vernova, Inc. engages in the electric power industry. It operates through the following segments: Power, Wind, and Electrification. The Power segment offers design, manufacture, and servicing gas, nuclear, hydro, and steam technologies, providing a critical foundation of dispatchable, flexible, stable, and reliable power. The Wind segment manages wind generation technologies, including onshore and offshore wind turbines and blades. The Electrification segment refers to the grid solutions, power conversion, electrification software, and solar and storage solutions technologies required for the transmission, distribution, conversion, storage, and orchestration of electricity from point of generation to point of consumption. The company was founded November 9, 2021 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: GE Vernova, Inc. 從事電力業。它透過以下部門運作：電力、風能和電氣化。電力部門提供設計、製造和維修天然氣、核能、水力和蒸汽技術，為可調度、靈活、穩定和可靠的電力提供關鍵基礎。風能部門管理風力發電技術，包括陸上和離岸風力渦輪機和葉片。電氣化部分是指從發電點到用電點的電力傳輸、分配、轉換、儲存和編排所需的電網解決方案、電力轉換、電氣化軟體以及太陽能和儲存解決方案技術。該公司成立於 2021 年 11 月 9 日，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: Netflix, Inc. engages in providing entertainment services. It also offers activities for leisure time, entertainment video, video gaming, and other sources of entertainment. It operates through the United States and International geographic segments. The company was founded by Marc Randolph and Wilmot Reed Hastings on August 29, 1997 and is headquartered in Los Gatos, CA.
info.description_zh: Netflix, Inc. 從事提供娛樂服務。它還提供休閒活動、娛樂影片、視頻遊戲和其他娛樂來源。它透過美國和國際地理部門開展業務。該公司由 Marc Randolph 和 Wilmot Reed Hastings 於 1997 年 8 月 29 日創立，總部位於加州洛斯加托斯。

info.description: Eaton Corp. Plc is a power management company, which provides energy-efficient solutions for electrical, hydraulic, and mechanical power. It operates through the following segments: Electrical Americas and Electrical Global; Aerospace, Vehicle, and eMobility. The Electrical Americas and Electrical Global segments engage in sales contracts for electrical components, industrial components, power distribution and assemblies, residential products, single and three phase power quality, wiring devices, circuit protection, utility power distribution, power reliability equipment, and service. The Aerospace segment supplies aerospace fuel, hydraulics, and pneumatic systems for commercial and military use. The Vehicle segment deals with the design, manufacture, marketing, and supply of drivetrain and powertrain systems and critical components that reduce emissions and improve fuel economy, stability, performance and safety of cars, light trucks and commercial vehicles. The eMobility segment designs, manufactures, markets, and supplies electrical and electronic components and systems that improve the power management and performance of both on-road and off-road vehicles. The company was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.
info.description_zh: 伊頓公司是一家電力管理公司，為電力、液壓和機械動力提供節能解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：Electrical Americas 和 Electrical Global；航空航太、車輛和電動車。 Electrical Americas 和 Electrical Global 部門從事電氣元件、工業元件、配電和組件、住宅產品、單相和三相電能品質、接線設備、電路保護、公用配電、電力可靠性設備和服務的銷售合約。航空航太部門提供商業和軍事用途的航空燃料、液壓和氣動系統。車輛部門從事傳動系統和動力系統以及關鍵部件的設計、製造、行銷和供應，以減少排放並提高轎車、輕型卡車和商用車的燃油經濟性、穩定性、性能和安全性。電動交通部門設計、製造、行銷和供應電氣和電子元件及系統，以改善公路和越野車輛的電源管理和性能。該公司成立於1911年，總部位於愛爾蘭都柏林。

info.description: Dominion Energy, Inc. engages in the production and distribution of energy. It operates through following business segments: Dominion Energy Virginia, Dominion Energy South Carolina, Contracted Energy, and Corporate and Other. The Corporate and Other segment focuses on corporate, service company, non-controlling interest in Dominion privatization, and non-regulated retail energy marketing operations. The company was founded by William W. Berry in 1983 and is headquartered in Richmond, VA.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Dominion Energy, Inc. 從事能源生產和分銷。它透過以下業務部門運作：Dominion Energy Virginia、Dominion Energy South Carolina、合約能源以及企業和其他。企業及其他部門專注於企業、服務公司、Dominion 私有化中的非控制權益以及不受監管的零售能源行銷業務。該公司由 William W. Berry 於 1983 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州里士滿。

info.description: Federal Realty Investment Trust is an equity real estate investment trust, which engages in the provision of ownership, management, and redevelopment of retail and mixed-use properties located primarily in communities where demand exceeds supply in strategically selected metropolitan markets. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in North Bethesda, MD.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 零售
info.description_zh: 聯邦房地產投資信託是一家股權房地產投資信託，致力於提供零售和混合用途房地產的所有權、管理和重建，這些房地產主要位於戰略選擇的大都市市場供不應求的社區。該公司成立於 1962 年，總部位於馬裡蘭州北貝塞斯達。

info.description: NRG Energy, Inc. engages in the production, sale, and distribution of energy and energy services. It operates through the following segments: Texas, East, West/Services/Other, Vivint Smart Home, and Corporate Activities. The Texas segment includes all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in Texas, other than Cottonwood. The East segment engages in all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in the East. The West/Services/Other segment is focused on all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in the West and Canada, and activities related to the Cottonwood facility and other investments. The Vivint Smart Home segment is a smart home platform that provides customers with technology, products and services to create a smarter, greener, safer home. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 獨立電力生產商
info.description_zh: NRG Energy, Inc. 從事能源和能源服務的生產、銷售和分銷。該公司透過以下部門營運：德州、東部、西部/服務/其他部門、Vivint 智慧家居部門和企業活動部門。德克薩斯州分部包括與德克薩斯州客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動（三葉楊除外）。東部部門從事與東部客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動。西部/服務/其他部門專注於與西部和加拿大的客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動，以及與卡頓伍德設施和其他投資相關的活動。 Vivint智慧家庭部門是一個智慧家庭平台，為客戶提供技術、產品和服務，以創造更智慧、更環保、更安全的家庭。該公司成立於 1989 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Realty Income Corp. is a real estate company, which engages in generating dependable monthly cash dividends from a consistent and predictable level of cash flow from operations. The company was founded by William E. Clark, Jr. and Evelyn Joan Clark in 1969 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 零售
info.description_zh: Realty Income Corp. 是一家房地產公司，致力於透過持續且可預測的營運現金流水準產生可靠的每月現金股息。該公司由 William E. Clark, Jr. 和 Evelyn Joan Clark 於 1969 年創立，總部位於加州聖地亞哥。

info.description: Union Pacific Corp. engages in the provision of railroad and freight transportation service. It delivers the goods families and businesses use every day with safe, reliable and efficient service. The company connects its customers and communities to the global economy. Union Pacific was founded on July 1, 1862 and is headquartered in Omaha, NE.
info.description_zh: Union Pacific Corp. 從事提供鐵路和貨運服務。它以安全、可靠和高效的服務為家庭和企業提供日常使用的物品。該公司將其客戶和社區與全球經濟聯繫起來。聯合太平洋公司成立於 1862 年 7 月 1 日，總部位於內布拉斯加州奧馬哈。

info.description: American Electric Power Co., Inc. engages in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity. It operates through the following segments: Vertically Integrated Utilities, Transmission and Distribution Utilities, AEP Transmission Holdco, and Generation and Marketing. The Vertically Integrated Utilities segment covers the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity for sale to retail and wholesale customers. The Transmission and Distribution Utilities segment represents the transmission and distribution of electricity for sale to retail and wholesale customers. The AEP Transmission Holdco segment comprised of the development, construction, and operation of transmission facilities through investments in its wholly-owned transmission subsidiaries and joint ventures. The Generation and Marketing segment consists of the non-regulated generation and marketing, risk management, and retail activities. The company was founded on December 20, 1906 and is headquartered in Columbus, OH.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: 美國電力公司從事發電、輸電和配電業務。它透過以下部門運作：垂直一體化公用事業部門、輸電和配電公用事業部門、AEP 傳輸控股公司以及發電和行銷部門。垂直一體化公用事業部門涵蓋向零售和批發客戶銷售電力的發電、輸電和配電。輸配電公用事業部門負責向零售和批發客戶銷售電力的輸配電業務。 AEP Transmission Holdco 部門透過投資其全資輸電子公司和合資企業來開發、建造和營運輸電設施。發電和行銷部門包括不受監管的發電和行銷、風險管理和零售活動。該公司成立於 1906 年 12 月 20 日，總部位於俄亥俄州哥倫布市。

info.description: CMS Energy Corp. engages in the provision of electric and natural gas activities. It operates through the following business segments: Electric Utility, Gas Utility, and NorthStar Clean Energy. The Electric Utility segment focuses on generation, purchase, distribution, and sale of electricity. The Gas Utility segment includes purchase, transmission, storage, distribution, and sale of natural gas. The NorthStar Clean Energy segment is involved in domestic independent power production including the development and operation of renewable generation and the marketing of independent power production. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jackson, MI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: CMS Energy Corp. 從事提供電力和天然氣活動。它透過以下業務部門運作：電力部門、燃氣部門和北極星清潔能源部門。電力公用事業部門專注於發電、購買、分配和銷售電力。燃氣公用事業部門包括天然氣的購買、輸送、儲存、分配和銷售。北極星清潔能源部門從事國內獨立電力生產，包括再生能源發電的開發和運營以及獨立電力生產的營銷。該公司成立於 1987 年，總部位於密西根州傑克遜。

info.description: Ameren Corp. is a public utility holding company, which engages in the provision of electric and natural gas services. It operates through the following segments: Ameren Missouri, Ameren Illinois Electric Distribution, Ameren Illinois Natural Gas, Ameren Transmission, and Other. The Ameren Transmission segment consists of the aggregated electric transmission businesses of Ameren Illinois and Ameren Transmission Company of Illinois (ATXI). The company was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in St. Louis, MO.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Ameren Corp. 是一家公用事業控股公司，從事提供電力和天然氣服務。該公司透過以下部門營運：Ameren 密蘇裡州、Ameren 伊利諾伊州電力分配部門、Ameren 伊利諾伊州天然氣部門、Ameren 傳輸部門和其他部門。 Ameren Transmission 部門由伊利諾州 Ameren Transmission Company 和伊利諾州 Ameren Transmission Company (ATXI) 的綜合電力傳輸業務組成。該公司成立於 1902 年，總部位於密蘇裡州聖路易斯。

info.description: Evergy, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of electricity through its subsidiaries. It focuses on the regulation of electric utilities and development of electric transmission projects. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Kansas City, MO.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Evergy, Inc. 是一家控股公司，透過其子公司從事電力供應業務。它的重點是電力公用事業的監管和輸電項目的發展。該公司成立於 2017 年，總部位於密蘇裡州堪薩斯市。

info.description: The Hartford Insurance Group, Inc. is an insurance and financial services company. It operates through the following segments: Commercial Lines, Personal Lines, Property & Casualty Other Operations, Group Benefits, Hartford Funds, and Corporate. The Commercial Lines segment provides workers' compensation, property, automobile, liability and umbrella coverage under several different products. The Personal Lines segment offers standard automobile, homeowners, and personal umbrella coverage to individuals. The Property & Casualty Other Operations segment includes certain property and casualty operations, managed by the company, that have discontinued writing new business and substantially all of the company's asbestos and environmental exposures. The Group Benefits segment provides group life, accident, and disability coverage, as well as group retiree health and voluntary benefits. The Hartford Funds segment offers investment products for retail and retirement accounts and provides investment management and administrative services. The Corporate segment includes corporate category discontinued operations, reserves for run-off structured settlement, and terminal funding agreement liabilities, restructuring costs, and capital raising activities. The company was founded by Terry Nathaniel on May 10, 1810, and is headquartered in Hartford, CT.
info.description_zh: Hartford Insurance Group, Inc. 是一家保險和金融服務公司。它透過以下部門運作：商業部門、個人部門、財產和傷亡其他業務部門、團體福利部門、哈特福德基金部門和企業部門。商業險部門透過多種不同的產品提供工傷賠償、財產、汽車、責任和總括保險。個人保險業務部門為個人提供標準的汽車、房屋和個人保護傘保險。財產和傷亡其他業務部門包括由公司管理的某些財產和傷亡業務，這些業務已停止編寫新業務以及公司幾乎所有的石棉和環境風險。團體福利部門提供團體人壽、意外和殘障保險，以及團體退休人員健康和自願福利。 Hartford Funds 部門為零售和退休帳戶提供投資產品，並提供投資管理和行政服務。公司部門包括公司類別已終止業務、徑流結構性結算準備金、終止融資協議負債、重組成本和融資活動。該公司由 Terry Nathaniel 於 1810 年 5 月 10 日創立，總部位於康乃狄克州哈特福德。

info.description: NVIDIA Corp. engages in the design and manufacture of computer graphics processors, chipsets, and related multimedia software. It operates through the following segments: Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) and Compute & Networking. The Graphics segment includes GeForce GPUs for gaming and PCs, the GeForce NOW game streaming service and related infrastructure, Quadro and NVIDIA RTX GPUs for enterprise workstation graphics, virtual GPU, or vGPU, software for cloud-based visual and virtual computing, automotive platforms for infotainment systems, and Omniverse Enterprise software for building and operating metaverse and 3D internet applications. The Compute & Networking segment consists of Data Center accelerated computing platforms and end-to-end networking platforms including Quantum for InfiniBand and Spectrum for Ethernet, NVIDIA DRIVE automated-driving platform and automotive development agreements, Jetson robotics and other embedded platforms, NVIDIA AI Enterprise and other software, and DGX Cloud software and services. The company was founded by Jen Hsun Huang, Chris A. Malachowsky, and Curtis R. Priem in April 1993 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: NVIDIA Corp. 從事電腦圖形處理器、晶片組和相關多媒體軟體的設計和製造。它透過以下部分運作：圖形處理單元（GPU）和運算與網路。圖形部分包括用於遊戲和 PC 的 GeForce GPU、GeForce NOW 遊戲串流服務和相關基礎設施、用於企業工作站圖形的 Quadro 和 NVIDIA RTX GPU、虛擬 GPU 或 vGPU、用於基於雲端的視覺和虛擬計算的軟體、用於資訊娛樂系統的汽車平台以及用於構建和操作 Metaverse 和 3D 互聯網應用程式設計的公司。運算和網路部門包括資料中心加速運算平台和端對端網路平台，包括InfiniBand的Quantum和乙太網路的Spectrum、NVIDIA DRIVE自動駕駛平台和汽車開發協定、Jetson機器人和其他嵌入式平台、NVIDIA AI Enterprise和其他軟體以及DGX Cloud軟體和服務。該公司由 Jen Hsun Huang、Chris A. Malachowsky 和 ​​Curtis R. Priem 於 1993 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Sandisk Corp. engages in the development, manufacture, and provision of storage devices and solutions based on NAND flash technology. Its products include solid state drives, memory cards, and USB flash drives. The company was founded on February 5, 2024 and is headquartered in Milpitas, CA.
info.description_zh: Sandisk Corp. 從事開發、製造和提供基於 NAND 快閃記憶體技術的儲存設備和解決方案。其產品包括固態硬碟、記憶卡和USB隨身碟。該公司成立於 2024 年 2 月 5 日，總部位於加州米爾皮塔斯。

info.description: Micron Technology, Inc. engages in the provision of innovative memory and storage solutions. It operates through the following segments: Compute and Networking Business Unit (CNBU), Mobile Business Unit (MBU), Embedded Business Unit (EBU), and Storage Business Unit (SBU). The CNBU segment includes memory products and solutions sold into client, cloud server, enterprise, graphics, and networking markets. The MBU segment is involved in memory and storage products sold into smartphone and other mobile-device markets. The EBU segment focuses on memory and storage products sold into automotive, industrial, and consumer Markets. The SBU segment consists of SSDs and component-level solutions sold into enterprise and cloud, client, and consumer storage markets. The company was founded by Ward D. Parkinson, Joseph Leon Parkinson, Dennis Wilson, and Doug Pitman on October 5, 1978 and is headquartered in Boise, ID.
info.description_zh: Micron Technology, Inc. 致力於提供創新的記憶體和儲存解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：運算和網路業務部門（CNBU）、行動業務部門（MBU）、嵌入式業務部門（EBU）和儲存業務部門（SBU）。 CNBU 部門包括銷售給客戶端、雲端伺服器、企業、圖形和網路市場的記憶體產品和解決方案。 MBU 部門涉及銷往智慧型手機和其他行動裝置市場的記憶體和儲存產品。 EBU 部門專注於銷往汽車、工業和消費市場的記憶體和儲存產品。 SBU 部門包括企業和雲端、用戶端和消費者儲存市場銷售的 SSD 和組件級解決方案。該公司由 Ward D. Parkinson、Joseph Leon Parkinson、Dennis Wilson 和 Doug Pitman 於 1978 年 10 月 5 日創立，總部位於愛達荷州博伊西。

info.description: DTE Energy Co. operates as a diversified energy company, which engages in the development and management of energy-related businesses and services. It operates through the following segments: Electric, Gas, DTE Vantage, Energy Trading, and Corporate and Other. The Electric segment consists of generation, purchase, distribution, and sale of electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in southeastern Michigan. The Gas segment is involved in the purchase, storage, transportation, distribution, and sale of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers throughout Michigan, and the sale of storage and transportation capacity. The DTE Vantage segment focuses on projects that deliver energy and utility-type products and services to industrial, commercial, and institutional customers, produce reduced emissions fuel, and sell electricity and pipeline-quality gas from renewable energy projects. The Energy Trading segment covers energy marketing and trading operations. The Corporate and Other segment includes various holding company activities, holds certain non-utility debt, and holds certain investments, as well as funds supporting regional development and economic growth. The company was founded in January 1995 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: DTE Energy Co.是一家多元化能源公司，從事能源相關業務和服務的開發和管理。該公司透過以下部門運作：電力部門、天然氣部門、DTE Vantage 部門、能源貿易部門以及企業及其他部門。電力部門包括向密西根州東南部的住宅、商業和工業客戶發電、購買、分配和銷售電力。天然氣部門涉及向密西根州各地的住宅、商業和工業客戶購買、儲存、運輸、分銷和銷售天然氣，以及銷售儲存和運輸能力。 DTE Vantage 部門專注於向工業、商業和機構客戶提供能源和公用事業型產品和服務、生產減少排放的燃料以及銷售來自再生能源專案的電力和管道品質天然氣的專案。能源貿易部門涵蓋能源行銷和貿易業務。公司及其他部門包括各種控股公司活動，持有某些非公用事業債務，並持有某些投資以及支持區域發展和經濟成長的基金。該公司成立於 1995 年 1 月，總部位於密西根州底特律。

info.description: Ball Corp. engages in the supplies of aluminum packaging for the beverage, personal care, and household products industries. It operates through the following segments: Beverage Packaging North and Central America, Beverage Packaging South America, and Beverage Packaging Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA). The Beverage Packaging North and Central America segment includes multi-year supply contracts to fillers of carbonated soft drinks, beer, energy drinks, and other beverages. The Beverage Packaging South America segment includes beverage containers in South America, and the manufacture of substantially all the metal beverage containers in Brazil. The Beverage Packaging EMEA segment consists of metal beverage containers in Europe, and other packaging materials used by the European beer and carbonated soft drink industries. The company was founded by Edmund Burke Ball, Frank Clayton Ball, George A. Ball, Lucius Lorenzo Ball, and William Charles Ball in 1880 and is headquartered in Westminster, CO.
info.description_zh: Ball Corp. 為飲料、個人護理和家居用品行業供應鋁包裝。該公司透過以下部門營運：北美和中美洲飲料包裝部門、南美飲料包裝部門以及歐洲、中東和非洲 (EMEA) 飲料包裝部門。北美和中美洲飲料包裝部門包括碳酸軟性飲料、啤酒、能量飲料和其他飲料填充機的多年供應合約。南美飲料包裝部門包括南美的飲料容器以及巴西幾乎所有金屬飲料容器的製造。歐洲、中東和非洲飲料包裝部門包括歐洲的金屬飲料容器以及歐洲啤酒和碳酸軟性飲料產業使用的其他包裝材料。該公司由 Edmund Burke Ball、Frank Clayton Ball、George A. Ball、Lucius Lorenzo Ball 和 William Charles Ball 於 1880 年創立，總部位於科羅拉多州威斯敏斯特。

info.description: Snap-On, Inc. engages in the manufacture and marketing of tools, equipment, diagnostics, repair information, and systems solutions for professional users performing critical tasks. Its products and services include hand and power tools, tool storage, diagnostics software, handheld and PC-based diagnostic products, information and management systems, shop equipment and other solutions for vehicle dealerships and repair centers, as well as for customers in industries such as aviation and aerospace, agriculture, construction, government and military, mining, natural resources, power generation, and technical education. It operates through the following segments: Commercial and Industrial Group, Snap-On Tools Group, Repair Systems and Information Group, and Financial Services. The Commercial and Industrial Group segment consists of business operations that serve the aerospace, natural resources, government, power generation, transportation, and technical education markets. The Snap-On Tools Group segment includes business operations primarily serving vehicle service and repair technicians through its worldwide mobile tool distribution channel. The Repair System and Information Group segment serves professional vehicle repair customers, primarily owners and managers of independent repair shops and original equipment manufacturer dealerships through direct and distributor channels. The Financial Services segment consists of installment sales and lease contracts arising from franchisees' customers, and business loans and vehicle leases to franchisees. The company was founded by Joseph Johnson and William Seidemann in 1920 and is headquartered in Kenosha, WI.
info.description_zh: Snap-On, Inc. 致力於為執行關鍵任務的專業使用者製造和行銷工具、設備、診斷、維修資訊和系統解決方案。其產品和服務包括手動和電動工具、工具儲存、診斷軟體、手持式和基於PC的診斷產品、資訊和管理系統、車間設備和其他解決方案，面向汽車經銷商和維修中心，以及航空航天、農業、建築、政府和軍事、採礦、自然資源、發電和技術教育等行業的客戶。該公司透過以下部門運作：商業和工業部門、實耐寶工具部門、維修系統和資訊部門以及金融服務部門。商業和工業集團部門包括服務於航空航太、自然資源、政府、發電、運輸和技術教育市場的業務運作。實耐寶工具集團業務部門主要透過其全球行動工具分銷管道為車輛服務和維修技術人員提供服務。維修系統和資訊集團部門透過直接和分銷管道為專業車輛維修客戶提供服務，主要是獨立維修店和原始設備製造商經銷商的所有者和經理。金融服務部門包括特許經營商客戶產生的分期銷售和租賃合同，以及向特許經營商提供的商業貸款和車輛租賃。該公司由 Joseph Johnson 和 William Seidemann 於 1920 年創立，總部位於威斯康辛州基諾沙。

info.description: lululemon athletica, Inc. engages in the business of designing, distributing, and retailing technical athletic apparel, footwear, and accessories. It operates through the following segments: Company-Operated Stores, Direct to Consumer, and Other. The company was founded by Dennis James Wilson in 1998 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.description_zh: lululemon sportsa, Inc. 從事設計、分銷和零售技術運動服裝、鞋類和配件的業務。它透過以下部門運作：公司自營商店部門、直接面向消費者部門和其他部門。該公司由 Dennis James Wilson 於 1998 年創立，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。
